name: The Scorpion Clan Coup
text: While you control an Imperial character, each character attacking one of your provinces gets –1 [mil] and –1 [pol].

name: Brushfires
text: Reaction: After this province is revealed, choose an attacking character – remove 2 fate from that character.

name: Yasuki Oguri
text:
Covert
Action: During a conflict in which this character is defending, spend 1 fate. Choose a character with 1 or more fate on it – move that character to the conflict.

name: Watchtower of Sun's Shadow
text:
Limit 1 per deck.
Each character attacking a province you control with a Kaiu Wall holding gets –1 [mil] and –1 [pol] for each fate on that character.
Forced Interrupt: When this holding's province is broken – you lose 2 fate.

name: Diplomatic Gift-Giver
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, each player chooses a character controlled by one of their opponents – each player moves 1 fate from their fate pool to the character they chose.

name: Keen Warrior
text:
Sincerity
Reaction: After you look at 1 or more cards in an opponent's hand (or those cards are revealed) – draw 2 cards, then place 1 card from your hand on the bottom of your conflict deck.

name: Overlooked Community
text: Action: Return a ring from your claimed ring pool to the unclaimed ring pool. Choose a status token on a character – discard it.

name: Revered Ikoma
text:
This character cannot receive dishonored status tokens.
Action: If you have gained 2 or more honor this phase – gain 1 fate.

name: Procedural Interference
text: Action: Choose an opponent's province. That opponent selects one – either discard each card in that province, or you gain 2 honor.

name: Asako Maezawa
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a character with no fate on it – bow that character. If that character is a  character, also dishonor it.

name: Sinister Peacekeeper
text:
Keeper role only.
Reaction: After an opponent gains 1 or more honor – that player loses 1 honor.

name: Khanbulak Benefactor
text:
Dire – While this character is participating in a conflict, reduce the cost to play each card in your hand by 1 (to a minimum of 0). (This character is dire when it has no fate on it.)
Reaction: After this character enters play – draw 2 cards.

name: Chikara
text:
Attach to a unique  character.
Ancestral. Restricted.
If attached character has the Champion trait, it gains: "Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a participating character – that character's controller moves all fate from it to their fate pool, then sacrifices it."

name: Guardians of Rokugan
text: Reaction: After you win a conflict as the defending player – search the top X cards of your dynasty deck for a character with printed cost X or lower and put it into play, where X is the amount of skill by which you won.

name: Exemplary Etiquette
text: Action: During a conflict – abilities on characters cannot be triggered this conflict.

name: Superior Authority
text: Action: During a conflict – characters without fate do not count their skill toward the resolution of this conflict.

name: Self-Understanding
text:
Restricted.
This attachment cannot be chosen as the target of an opponent's event.
Attached character gains: "Reaction: After this character wins a conflict – resolve the effect of each ring in your claimed ring pool."

name: Renowned Singer
text:
Water role only.
Action: If you have gained 2 or more honor this phase, choose an opponent and 2 cards in your conflict discard pile. That opponent chooses 1 of those cards – add the chosen card to your hand and place the other on the bottom of your conflict deck.

name: Heresy!
text:
Void role only.
Action: During a conflict, initiate a [pol] duel between a character your opponent controls of your choice and a character you control of your opponent's choice – resolve the duel. Remove 1 fate from the duel's loser.

name: Kunshu
text:
Attach to a unique character you control.
Ancestral. Restricted
Attached character gains: "Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, discard the Imperial Favor. Choose an event or attachment in your opponent's conflict discard pile – play that card without paying its fate cost."

name: Daughter of War
text:
Void role only.
Attach to a character you control.
Reaction: When attached character leaves play – search your dynasty deck for a character with lower printed cost than attached character and put it into play. Shuffle.

name: Make Your Case
text:
Seeker role only.
Action: During a conflict, initiate a [pol] duel against a character your opponent controls of their choice – resolve the duel. Place 1 fate on the duel's winner.
